codeReview.summary: The fix commit resolves the two blocking misses from uniswap-component-level-polish and satisfies this feature's expected behavior. In the original failure, price-chart.tsx still contained #555555 crosshair colors and transactions-table.tsx still contained #9B9B9B cell text; both are replaced in this fix, and repository search now shows no #555555/#9B9B9B/#888888 in web/components or web/app.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker skill still documents '#888888' as the standard secondary text color, which is outdated for this milestone's Uniswap token mapping.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md (Work Procedure step 3) says 'Dark mode first: #212121 background, #FFFFFF primary text, #888888 secondary'; handoff.skillFeedback in /Users/maxmohammadi/.factory/missions/79476079-9b4c-40cb-b69e-9e85801c6056/handoffs/2026-04-01T13-45-52-020Z__fix-residual-hardcoded-colors__7577a13a-88a3-468a-8a30-83a2ebbe9229.json flags this mismatch.

summary: Pass: commit 3853e28 fully addresses the prior blocking color failures (price-chart.tsx and transactions-table.tsx) and meets the fix feature's global hardcoded-color removal requirement for web/components and web/app.
